summary: Full backend + frontend e2e testing of Raku (AI academic OS). 14/14 pytest backend tests pass; Today/Calendar/Chat/Connections/Settings/Extension frontend flows all work with real Claude Sonnet 4.5 replies via Emergent LLM key. Accent color persists across reload; Google Calendar mock sync + dedupe + disconnect all verified. No blockers.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 643 lines — approaching split threshold. Consider splitting into routers (tasks.py, chat.py, integrations.py) if it grows further.

Chat endpoint replays entire conversation history by re-sending every prior user message to LlmChat before the new one — this causes repeated LLM calls and higher latency/cost as the conversation grows. Emergent LlmChat already persists session history internally when session_id is stable; the re-send loop is likely redundant.

PATCH /api/me accepts any string for 'vibe' (not validated against the Literal on the User model), so invalid vibes can be stored and then break VIBE_PROMPTS lookup (falls back silently but should 400).
sync_integration() awaits import_assignments() by calling the route function directly — works but couples HTTP-layer to internal logic; extract a helper for reuse.
Seed creates 'today events' by replacing hour/minute on now — if server runs near midnight UTC the events may land outside the 'today' window in /api/today (timezone-naive for users).
seed_data_creation: Backend auto-seeds on startup (user + 3 integrations + 4 tasks + 3 events). Tests add/remove TEST_-prefixed tasks and clean up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_raku_backend.py covers me/today/calendar/tasks CRUD/assignments import (dedupe)/integrations (list/sync gcal+notion/disconnect)/chat (send + replay). Public URL from REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. All data-testid attributes present and reliable. Frontend uses React Router; sidebar data-testid pattern is nav-<lowercase-label>. Chat uses real LlmChat with claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929 — replies arrive in 3-10s.
